subject: Naming micro-service - Helm char values changes for new policy API.
commit_message:
Naming micro-service - Helm char values changes for new policy API.

Changes requested by Yuriy.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-1307

Signed-off-by: bt2983 <bt2983@att.com>
Change-Id: Iecffe0068c489c0ecb4c4882de34c8d4c0b1cda3

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

Hi Jimmy, Can you comment on the correct aaiTrustStore Path. Seems it change in Frankfurt release?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (2 comments)
> 
> Hi Jimmy, Can you comment on the correct aaiTrustStore Path. Seems it change in Frankfurt release?

AAI's certificate is signed by the AAF certificate authority, so I don't see the need to have a separate trustStore specific to AAI - I recommend using truststoreONAPall.jks which is distributed by AAF, here's where AAI keeps ours: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=aai/oom.git;a=blob;f=resources/config/auth/truststoreONAPall.jks;h=ff844b109d97cf4c452c1a275c50ca5e8acd59af;hb=9b27009ab70a2d4fccd43247f7dbb887cb944293

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

All new password stuff / touching existing passwords must be done in a proper way.

@krzysztof, do we already have a secret for policy "policy-xacml-pdp" user?

Patch Set 1:

Sylvain, This patch can be abandon and is no applicable anymore. We have another patch that is dealing with this issue.
